title: Seattle Lotus Vegetarian Restaurant
content: # Seattle Lotus Vegetarian Restaurant. # [Seattle Lotus Vegetarian Restaurant](https://www.seattlelotus.com/). *   [HOME](https://www.seattlelotus.com/). *   [MENU](https://www.seattlelotus.com/menu). *   [REVIEWS](https://www.seattlelotus.com/reviews). *   [VISIT US](https://www.seattlelotus.com/contact-us). Use tab to navigate through the menu items. ![Image 1](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/84770f_7809b6834ac94544a573944d0fe00c71~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1276,h_325,al_c,q_85,enc_avif,quality_auto/84770f_7809b6834ac94544a573944d0fe00c71~mv2.jpg). ![Image 2](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/84770f_681dd478506548d08be180a256b3330c.png/v1/fill/w_75,h_75,al_c,q_85,enc_avif,quality_auto/84770f_681dd478506548d08be180a256b3330c.png). ![Image 3](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/84770f_681dd478506548d08be180a256b3330c.png/v1/fill/w_75,h_75,al_c,q_85,enc_avif,quality_auto/84770f_681dd478506548d08be180a256b3330c.png). ## REVIEWS. ![Image 4](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/84770f_681dd478506548d08be180a256b3330c.png/v1/fill/w_75,h_75,al_c,q_85,enc_avif,quality_auto/84770f_681dd478506548d08be180a256b3330c.png). ![Image 5](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/84770f_681dd478506548d08be180a256b3330c.png/v1/fill/w_75,h_75,al_c,q_85,enc_avif,quality_auto/84770f_681dd478506548d08be180a256b3330c.png). Their food was fairly quick, the place was clean as well. When the food came, we were speechless!". “Very Delicious Vietnamese Food in Pleasant Environment was Great Service and Reasonably Priced.”. The mushroom + tofu hotpot was delicious. Take your meat eating friends here - their meat substitutes are so good that my vegetarian friend and I did a double take!”. “Great vegetarian dishes, love all the noodle dishes. My family have been eating there several times and ordering to go for dinner :D”. [![Image 6](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/0fddc9_0f8e2231b3d14b68b8ecf3d9db23366e~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_578,h_443,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/0fddc9_0f8e2231b3d14b68b8ecf3d9db23366e~mv2.png)](https://www.seattletimes.com/life/food-drink/seattle-lotus-a-vegetarians-paradise-in-white-center/). Seattle Lotus' Appearance on The Seattle Times, June 30, 2017. [10439 16th Ave SW, Seattle, WA 98146](https://goo.gl/maps/myeXHkn47qEhRWUEA).

title: SEATTLE LOTUS VEGETARIAN RESTAURANT - Tripadvisor
content: The food and service at this restaurant are amazing! We went and had the lemongrass tofu, spring rolls and vegetable hot pot. As vegans, our hearts were happy

title: Seattle Lotus Vegetarian - Seattle Washington Restaurant
content: Overall our food was nothing special. Dry and lacking flavor for sure. This is Seattle where we have lots of amazing vegan options. I would definitely not

title: SEATTLE LOTUS VEGETARIAN RESTAURANT - Yelp
